content.principles: 1. Penetration (穿透): Key never exists. Sol: Bloom Filter, cache null values. 2. Breakdown (击穿): Hot key expires. Sol: Mutex lock, logical expiration. 3. Avalanche (雪崩): Many keys expire or Redis down. Sol: Random TTL, circuit breaker, high availability.
content.pitfalls: Bloom filter false positives. Mutex lock causing high latency for many requests. Incorrect TTL randomization logic.
